display.purpose: Hero display typography. Space Grotesk 700 with tight tracking -0.05em.

label.purpose: Buttons, nav links, JetBrains Mono 600 uppercase.

shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Resting cards have no shadow. Contours only.

shadows.name: shadow-md
shadows.purpose: No drop shadow. Contrast and outline determine depth.

shadows.name: shadow-glow
shadows.purpose: Glow shadows are replaced by high-contrast inverse block styling.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Safety Orange block button with sharp corners and monochrome text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #ff5500; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 10px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 0px; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #000000; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Black outlined block button with sharp corners.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost">Learn More <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M2.5 6h7M6.5 3l3 3-3 3"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #000000; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 10px 24px; border: 1px solid oklch(15% 0.008 265); border-radius: 0px; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(15% 0.008 265); color: #ffffff; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Monochrome JetBrains Mono navigation link with orange highlight.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(35% 0.01 240); text-decoration: none; position: relative; padding: 4px 0; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: oklch(0% 0 0); } .ds-nav-link.active { color: #ff5500; }

components.name: Terminal Card
components.description: Monochrome flat card with 4px border-radius and 1px hairline border.
components.html:
HYBRID SEARCH

BM25 + HNSW

Full-text and vector search combined in a single index.
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(96% 0.002 85); border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid oklch(15% 0.008 265); overflow: hidden; transition: background 220ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), border-color 220ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-card:hover { background: oklch(92% 0.003 85); border-color: oklch(0% 0 0); } .ds-card-header { display: flex; gap: 6px; padding: 12px 16px; background: oklch(94% 0.004 85); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(15% 0.008 265); } .ds-card-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid oklch(15% 0.008 265); background: transparent; } .ds-card-dot:nth-child(1) { background: oklch(50% 0.23 25); } .ds-card-content { padding: 24px; } .ds-card-label { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(35% 0.01 240); margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.1; letter-spacing: -0.04em; color: #000000; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.65; color: oklch(40% 0.01 80); }

narrative.overview: VantaDB is an embedded cognitive memory engine for AI agents. Invisibly fast, mathematically precise. The Swiss High-Contrast system emphasizes structural grids (hairlines), huge geometric typography (Space Grotesk), raw industrial warnings (Safety Orange), and absolute functional clarity. Flat structures, warm paper texture, zero decoration.
keyCharacteristics: Light backdrop (warm paper) with pure black elements and hairlines
Safety Orange (#ff5500) as the high-visibility single accent signal
Swiss editorial type hierarchy: Space Grotesk display, Outfit body, JetBrains Mono labels
Zero drop shadows — depth is created by 1px borders and contrasting fills
Snappy and rigid animations — linear or minimal easing, no slow spring delays
Esquemas de interacción táctiles pero geométricos, bordes rectos (0px to 4px radius)

rules.name: The Safety Signal Rule
rules.body: Safety Orange is used exclusively for highlights, primary CTAs, active status, or key metrics. Max 15% coverage.

rules.name: The Swiss Grid Rule
rules.body: All containers and key sections are bound by 1px solid black/dark border lines. No soft floating cards.

rules.name: The Mono Label Rule
rules.body: All tags, badges, buttons, metadata, and nav items use JetBrains Mono at 0.72rem uppercase with 0.14em tracking.

rules.name: The Sharp Corner Rule
rules.body: Default button border-radius is 0px. Core containers can have up to 4px max.

rules.name: The Snappy Motion Rule
rules.body: No slow bounce or slide anims. snappy micro-reveals under 250ms with Snappy Easing.

dos: Use Safety Orange for primary action and metrics highlight.
Separate sections with 1px solid border lines.
Use Space Grotesk with negative tracking for large display headers.
Maintain a light warm paper backdrop.
Respect prefers-reduced-motion with instant snap fallback.
Ensure touch targets are distinct and rectangular.
donts: Don't use drop shadows or box-shadow offsets.
Don't use gradient texts or gradient fills.
Don't use round pill shapes for buttons.
